/bin/bash -lc "python3 -c \"
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('/root/results.csv')
print(f'Total events: {len(df)}')
print(f'Columns: {list(df.columns)}')

# Check time range
times = pd.to_datetime(df['time'])
print(f'Time range: {times.min()} to {times.max()}')

# Filter to the evaluation window
mask = (times >= '2019-07-04T19:00:00') & (times <= '2019-07-04T20:00:00')
print(f'Events in evaluation window: {mask.sum()}')

# Check for duplicates within 5 seconds
times_sorted = times[mask].sort_values().reset_index(drop=True)
diffs = times_sorted.diff().dt.total_seconds()
close_pairs = (diffs < 5).sum()
print(f'Events within 5s of each other: {close_pairs}')
print(f'Num picks stats:')
print(df['num_picks'].describe())
\" 2>&1"

/bin/bash -lc "cat << 'PYEOF' > /root/solve.py
#"'!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Seismic phase association pipeline:
1. Load waveform (MSEED) and station data (CSV)
2. Pick P and S waves using PhaseNet (SeisBench)
3. Associate picks into earthquake events using GaMMA
4. Write event catalog to results.csv
"""

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import obspy
import seisbench.models as sbm
from gamma.utils import association

# ============================================================
# 1. Load data
# ============================================================
print("Loading waveform data...")
st = obspy.read("/root/data/wave.mseed")
print(f"  {len(st)} traces loaded")
print(f"  Time range: {st[0].stats.starttime} to {st[0].stats.endtime}")

print("Loading station data...")
stations_df = pd.read_csv("/root/data/stations.csv")

# Get unique stations (one row per station)
station_info = stations_df.groupby(["network", "station"]).first().reset_index()
station_info = station_info[["network", "station", "longitude", "latitude", "elevation_m"]].drop_duplicates()
print(f"  {len(station_info)} unique stations")

# ============================================================
# 2. Phase picking with PhaseNet
# ============================================================
print("'"\\nLoading PhaseNet model...\")
model = sbm.PhaseNet.from_pretrained(\"instance\")
print(\"Running phase picking...\")

# Use lower thresholds for better recall
result = model.classify(
    st,
    batch_size=64,
    P_threshold=0.2,
    S_threshold=0.2,
)

picks_raw = result.picks
print(f\"  {len(picks_raw)} picks found\")

# Convert picks to DataFrame
pick_records = []
for pick in picks_raw:
    trace_id = pick.trace_id
    parts = trace_id.split(\".\")
    station_id = f\"{parts[0]}.{parts[1]}\"
    
    pick_records.append({
        \"id\": station_id,
        \"timestamp\": pick.peak_time.datetime,
        \"type\": pick.phase.upper(),
        \"prob\": pick.peak_value,
    })

picks_df = pd.DataFrame(pick_records)
print(f\"  P picks: {(picks_df['type']=='P').sum()}, S picks: {(picks_df['type']=='S').sum()}\")

# ============================================================
# 3. Prepare station data for GaMMA
# ============================================================
print(\"\\nPreparing station coordinates...\")

lat0 = station_info[\"latitude\"].mean()
lon0 = station_info[\"longitude\"].mean()

station_gamma = pd.DataFrame()
station_gamma[\"id\"] = station_info[\"network\"] + \".\" + station_info[\"station\"]
station_gamma[\"x(km)\"] = (station_info[\"longitude\"].values - lon0) * 111.19 * np.cos(np.radians(lat0))
station_gamma[\"y(km)\"] = (station_info[\"latitude\"].values - lat0) * 111.19
station_gamma[\"z(km)\"] = -station_info[\"elevation_m\"].values / 1000.0

# Compute bounds
x_min, x_max = station_gamma[\"x(km)\"].min() - 10, station_gamma[\"x(km)\"].max() + 10
y_min, y_max = station_gamma[\"y(km)\"].min() - 10, station_gamma[\"y(km)\"].max() + 10
z_min, z_max = 0, 30

# ============================================================
# 4. Run GaMMA association
# ============================================================
print(\"\\nRunning GaMMA association...\")

picks_df[\"timestamp\"] = pd.to_datetime(picks_df[\"timestamp\"])

config = {
    \"use_dbscan\": True,
    \"use_amplitude\": False,
    \"method\": \"BGMM\",
    \"oversample_factor\": 5,
    \"dims\": [\"x(km)\", \"y(km)\", \"z(km)\"],
    \"x(km)\": (x_min, x_max),
    \"y(km)\": (y_min, y_max),
    \"z(km)\": (z_min, z_max),
    \"vel\": {\"p\": 6.0, \"s\": 6.0 / 1.75},
    \"eikonal\": None,
    \"bfgs_bounds\": (
        (x_min, x_max),
        (y_min, y_max),
        (z_min, z_max),
        (None, None),
    ),
    \"dbscan_eps\": 30,
    \"dbscan_min_samples\": 3,
    \"min_picks_per_eq\": 4,
    \"max_sigma11\": 3.0,
    \"max_sigma22\": 1.5,
    \"max_sigma12\": 1.5,
}

catalogs, assignments = association(picks_df, station_gamma, config, method=config[\"method\"])

print(f\"  {len(catalogs)} events found\")

# ============================================================
# 5. Write results
# ============================================================
if len(catalogs) > 0:
    events_df = pd.DataFrame(catalogs)
    print(f\"\\nEvent catalog columns: {list(events_df.columns)}\")
    
    # Convert time to ISO format without timezone
    events_df[\"time\"] = pd.to_datetime(events_df[\"time\"]).dt.strftime(\"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%f\")
    
    # Remove potential duplicate events (within 3 seconds)
    times = pd.to_datetime(events_df[\"time\"])
    events_df = events_df.sort_values(\"time\").reset_index(drop=True)
    times_sorted = pd.to_datetime(events_df[\"time\"])
    keep = [True]
    for i in range(1, len(times_sorted)):
        diff = (times_sorted.iloc[i] - times_sorted.iloc[i-1]).total_seconds()
        if diff < 3.0:
            # Keep the one with more picks
            if events_df.iloc[i][\"num_picks\"] > events_df.iloc[i-1][\"num_picks\"]:
                keep[-1] = False
                keep.append(True)
            else:
                keep.append(False)
        else:
            keep.append(True)
    events_df = events_df[keep].reset_index(drop=True)
    
    events_df.to_csv(\"/root/results.csv\", index=False)
    print(f\"\\nWrote {len(events_df)} events to /root/results.csv\")
    print(\"\\nFirst 20 events:\")
    print(events_df[[\"time\"]].head(20).to_string())
else:
    print(\"WARNING: No events found"'!")
    pd.DataFrame(columns=["time"]).to_csv("/root/results.csv", index=False)

print("'"\\nDone"'!")
PYEOF
echo "Script updated"'
/bin/bash -lc "python3 -c \"
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('/root/results.csv')
print(f'Total events: {len(df)}')
times = pd.to_datetime(df['time'])
print(f'Time range: {times.min()} to {times.max()}')

# Check spacing
times_sorted = times.sort_values().reset_index(drop=True)
diffs = times_sorted.diff().dt.total_seconds().dropna()
print(f'Min gap: {diffs.min():.1f}s')
print(f'Mean gap: {diffs.mean():.1f}s')
print(f'Events within 5s of each other: {(diffs < 5).sum()}')
print(f'Events within 3s of each other: {(diffs < 3).sum()}')
\" 2>&1"
head -3 /root/results.csv; echo "---"; wc -l /root/results.csv
